tasks.title: API Connection Issues - Fixed
tasks.description: Resolved API server dependency and connection issues preventing client-server communication
tasks.details: Fixed the Cannot find module '@hono/node-server' error by ensuring proper pnpm install from monorepo root. API server now successfully starts on port 1337 and endpoints like /users/me and /workspace are responding correctly. Client can now connect to API without ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED errors.

tasks.title: Phase 4: User Experience & Frontend Enhancement
tasks.description: Transform Meridian into a modern, user-friendly platform with comprehensive UI/UX improvements
tasks.details: Implement modern design system, visual workflow builder UI, enhanced dashboard analytics, and mobile-responsive experience with PWA features

subtasks.title: Phase 4.1: Design System & Component Library
subtasks.description: Implement modern design tokens, theming system, reusable component library, accessibility-first approach, and Storybook documentation
subtasks.details: Create comprehensive design token system with dark/light theme support, implement 50+ reusable UI components (layout, form, feedback, navigation, data display, interactive), set up Storybook for component documentation, ensure WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility compliance

subtasks.title: Phase 4.2: Visual Workflow Builder UI
subtasks.description: Implement React Flow integration for drag-and-drop workflow creation with node configuration panels and real-time execution monitoring
subtasks.details: Integrate React Flow for visual workflow canvas, implement 25+ node types (trigger, action, logic, integration), create dynamic configuration panels with JSON schema validation, build real-time execution monitoring with animated flow visualization, connect to Phase 3.2.3 backend APIs

subtasks.title: Phase 4.3: Enhanced Dashboard & Analytics
subtasks.description: Build interactive chart components, real-time data visualization, customizable dashboard layouts, and advanced filtering/search capabilities
subtasks.details: Implement interactive chart library (line, bar, pie, area, scatter, heatmap, Gantt), create customizable drag-and-drop dashboard layouts, build advanced filtering and global search functionality, integrate real-time data updates with WebSocket connections, connect to Phase 2 analytics APIs

subtasks.title: Phase 4.4: Mobile Experience & Performance
subtasks.description: Implement mobile-first responsive design, Progressive Web App features, performance optimization, and smooth animations
subtasks.details: Create mobile-first responsive layouts with touch-friendly interfaces, implement PWA features (service worker, offline support, push notifications), optimize performance (code splitting, lazy loading, caching), add smooth animations with Framer Motion, ensure Lighthouse score >90 across all metrics

tasks.title: Phase 2: Advanced Analytics & Reporting System
tasks.description: Implement a comprehensive analytics and reporting system with custom report builder, scheduled reports, and interactive widgets to enhance data-driven decision making across all user personas.

subtasks.title: Phase 2.1: Custom Report Builder
subtasks.description: Implement a visual report builder with drag-and-drop interface, metric selection, and visualization configuration. Features include 20+ metrics, 6+ chart types, real-time preview, and RBAC integration.

subtasks.title: Phase 2.2: Scheduled Reports & Automation
subtasks.description: Implement a comprehensive scheduled reports system with flexible scheduling options, multi-method delivery (email, Slack, Teams), execution tracking, and template management.

subtasks.title: Phase 2.3: Interactive Widgets & Dashboards
subtasks.description: Implement real-time data visualization widgets, customizable dashboard layouts, cross-widget interactivity, and mobile-optimized views with export capabilities.

subtasks.title: Implement Visual Report Designer Interface
subtasks.description: Create the main report builder interface with drag-and-drop functionality, metric selection panels, and visualization configuration options. Implement responsive layout and real-time preview.

subtasks.title: Develop Metric Library System
subtasks.description: Implement the comprehensive metric library with 20+ metrics across 5 categories (Project, Task, Team, Time, Custom). Include metric definitions, calculations, and data source mappings.

subtasks.title: Create Visualization Components
subtasks.description: Develop 6+ chart types including metric cards, bar charts, line charts, pie charts, gauges, and heatmaps. Implement configuration options and real-time data binding.

subtasks.title: Implement RBAC Integration
subtasks.description: Integrate role-based access control for report creation and management. Implement permission checks, workspace scoping, and user role validation throughout the report builder.
